sections.paragraph: (“wells”), [Beeroth], pr.n. of a town of the Gibeonites ( Jos 9:17), afterwards of the Benjamites ( Jos 18:25 2Sa 4:2), still in being and inhabited after the exile ( Ezr 2:25 Neh 7:29). The Gentile noun is בְּאֵרֹתִי 2Sa 4:2 23:37 , and contr. בֵּרֹתִי 1Ch 11:39. Comp. below בֵּרֹותַי. [Now prob. called el-Bîreh, البيره, Rob. ii. 132.]
